company_name: 公益社団法人北海道シルバー人材センター連合会
hunter_likelihood_reason: Silver Human Resources Center provides part-time/temporary employment for senior citizens (60+), not headhunting. Official site uses term '高齢者' and '臨時的かつ短期的な軽易業務'.
notes: Email shimizu@sjc.ne.jp confirmed on national federation listing page for Shimizu-cho Silver HRC at same address/phone as MHLW record. Phone 0156-62-6058 matches exactly. Company website at webc.sjc.ne.jp/shimizu confirmed same entity.
